homepage.heroSubline: Superior Tile & Countertops delivers exceptional flooring solutions across Bakersfield. Expert installation and unparalleled customer service, every time.
aboutText: Superior Tile & Countertops started with a simple goal: to provide Bakersfield with reliable, high-quality flooring services. Founded by a team of seasoned professionals, we've built our reputation on hard work and a commitment to exceeding expectations.

We believe in a customer-first approach. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, we're dedicated to clear communication, meticulous craftsmanship, and lasting results. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and attention.

As a local business, we're invested in the Bakersfield community. We source materials locally whenever possible, supporting other businesses and contributing to the economic well-being of our region. We strive to be a responsible and valued member of our community.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our skilled installers ensure precise and durable flooring that stands the test of time.

valueProps.description: Choose from a vast array of tile, hardwood, laminate, and more to match your style and budget.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Quality
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to your satisfaction.

valueProps.title: Free Estimates
valueProps.description: Get a clear and accurate estimate for your project, with no hidden fees or surprises.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Superior Tile & Countertops today for a free consultation and estimate. Let's bring your vision to life.

services.name: Tile Installation
services.shortDescription: Precision tile installation for kitchens, bathrooms, and beyond.
services.description: Tile installation requires a delicate balance of artistry and technical skill. In Bakersfield's climate, proper substrate preparation and grout selection are crucial to prevent cracking and water damage. We specialize in installing all types of tile, including ceramic, porcelain, slate, and glass. Our team meticulously prepares the subfloor, ensuring a level and stable surface for the tile. We then use premium adhesives and grouts to create a durable and visually stunning finish. Whether you're renovating a bathroom in Oleander-Sunset or updating your kitchen in Seven Oaks, we have the expertise to handle any tile project. We work closely with you to select the perfect tile and design a layout that complements your space. Our attention to detail ensures that every tile is perfectly aligned and grouted, creating a seamless and long-lasting surface. We also offer tile repair and replacement services to address any existing issues.
process: Step 3: Precise Tile Cutting and Layout
benefits: Water resistance for bathrooms and kitchens

faq.question: What types of tile do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide variety of tile, including ceramic, porcelain, glass, slate, and natural stone. We can help you choose the best tile for your specific needs and budget.

faq.question: How long does tile installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of tile installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the consultation phase and keep you informed throughout the process.

faq.question: Do you offer tile repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer tile repair and replacement services to address cracked, chipped, or damaged tiles. We can also repair grout and address any water damage issues.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Timeless hardwood flooring installation and refinishing services.
services.description: Hardwood flooring adds warmth and elegance to any home. In Bakersfield, where homes range from older residences near the Crystal Palace to newer developments further out, hardwood can be a versatile choice. We offer a wide selection of hardwood species, finishes, and styles to match your taste and budget. Our experienced installers ensure a precise and durable installation, taking into account the unique challenges of Bakersfield's climate. We also provide hardwood refinishing services to restore the beauty of existing floors. Our refinishing process includes sanding, staining, and sealing to create a smooth and lustrous finish. We use dustless sanding equipment to minimize mess and disruption to your home. Whether you're looking to install new hardwood floors or restore existing ones, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We understand the importance of proper acclimation and moisture control to prevent warping and cracking in Bakersfield's dry climate.

faq.question: What types of hardwood flooring do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of hardwood flooring, including solid hardwood, engineered hardwood, and bamboo. We can help you choose the best option for your specific needs and budget.

faq.question: How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of hardwood flooring installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the consultation phase.

faq.question: Do you offer hardwood refinishing services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer hardwood refinishing services to restore the beauty of existing floors. Our refinishing process includes sanding, staining, and sealing.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable and durable laminate flooring solutions for any room.
services.description: Laminate flooring is a cost-effective and versatile alternative to hardwood. It's a great option for Bakersfield homeowners looking for a durable and easy-to-maintain floor. We offer a wide selection of laminate styles and colors to match any decor. Our experienced installers ensure a precise and professional installation. Laminate flooring is resistant to scratches, stains, and fading, making it ideal for high-traffic areas and homes with pets. It's also easy to clean and maintain, requiring only regular sweeping and mopping. We work closely with you to select the perfect laminate flooring for your needs and budget. Our installation process includes proper subfloor preparation and moisture barrier installation to prevent warping and damage. Whether you're updating a rental property or renovating your own home, laminate flooring is a smart and stylish choice.
process: Step 3: Precise Laminate Cutting and Installation
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While most laminate flooring is water-resistant, it's not completely waterproof. We recommend choosing a water-resistant laminate for bathrooms and kitchens.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care and maintenance, laminate flooring can last for 10-20 years or more.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While it's possible to install laminate flooring yourself, we recommend professional installation to ensure a proper and long-lasting result.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and stylish vinyl flooring for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.description: Vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for Bakersfield homes due to its durability and water resistance, particularly important in areas prone to leaks or spills. We offer a wide range of vinyl flooring options, including luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and sheet vinyl, in various styles and colors. Our skilled installers ensure a seamless and waterproof installation. Vinyl flooring is easy to clean and maintain, making it ideal for busy families and pet owners. It's also comfortable underfoot and provides excellent sound insulation. We work closely with you to select the perfect vinyl flooring for your needs and budget. Our installation process includes proper subfloor preparation and adhesive application to prevent bubbling and warping. Whether you're updating your bathroom, kitchen, or laundry room, vinyl flooring is a practical and stylish choice.

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for bathrooms?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its waterproof properties.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Vinyl flooring can be easily cleaned with a damp mop and mild detergent.

faq.question: What is the difference between sheet vinyl and LVP?
faq.answer: Sheet vinyl comes in large rolls and provides a seamless surface. LVP comes in individual planks that click together, mimicking the look of hardwood or tile.

services.name: Countertop Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert countertop installation services for kitchens and bathrooms.
services.description: We offer professional countertop installation services in Bakersfield, providing a wide range of materials including granite, quartz, marble, and laminate. Our experienced team ensures precise measurements, seamless installation, and a stunning finish. We understand that countertops are a focal point in any kitchen or bathroom, and we take pride in delivering exceptional results. Whether you're renovating your entire kitchen or simply replacing your countertops, we have the expertise to handle any project. We work closely with you to select the perfect material and design to complement your space. Our installation process includes careful removal of your old countertops, precise cutting and fitting of the new countertops, and secure installation with high-quality adhesives and sealants. We also offer countertop repair and maintenance services to keep your countertops looking their best.
process: Step 1: Material Selection and Design Consultation
Step 2: Precise Measurement and Template Creation
benefits: Customized design to match your style

faq.question: What types of countertop materials do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of countertop materials, including granite, quartz, marble, laminate, and solid surface. We can help you choose the best option for your needs and budget.

faq.question: How long does countertop installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of countertop installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the consultation phase.

faq.question: Do you offer countertop repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer countertop repair services to address cracks, chips, and stains. We can also reseal your countertops to protect them from damage.

services.name: Flooring Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable flooring repair services to restore your floors to their former glory.
services.description: From water damage in older Bakersfield homes near the Kern River Parkway to wear and tear in newer suburban developments, flooring can take a beating. Superior Tile & Countertops provides comprehensive flooring repair services to address a wide range of issues. We repair hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl flooring, restoring them to their former glory. Our experienced technicians diagnose the problem accurately and provide effective solutions. We handle everything from replacing damaged planks and tiles to repairing subfloor issues and addressing water damage. We understand the importance of a properly installed and maintained floor, and we're committed to providing reliable and affordable repair services. Our goal is to extend the life of your flooring and save you the cost of a full replacement.
benefits: Extends the life of your flooring
Saves you money on replacement costs
Restores the beauty of your floors

faq.question: What types of flooring do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl flooring. We can address a wide range of issues, including water damage, cracks, chips, and loose planks or tiles.

faq.question: How much does flooring repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of flooring repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. We provide a free estimate after assessing the damage.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency flooring repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency flooring repair services for urgent situations, such as water damage or safety hazards.

serviceAreas.content:
Superior Tile & Countertops is proud to offer comprehensive flooring and countertop services to the residents and businesses of Bakersfield, California. We understand the unique needs of this vibrant community and are committed to providing top-quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. Whether you're looking to upgrade your kitchen with stunning new countertops or transform your floors with beautiful tile, we have the expertise and resources to bring your vision to life.

Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to delivering outstanding results that exceed your expectations. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure that your project is completed to the highest standards. From initial consultation to final installation, we'll work closely with you every step of the way to ensure your complete satisfaction.

We offer a wide range of flooring and countertop options to suit any style and budget. Contact us today to schedule a free consultation and let us help you create the home of your dreams.
serviceAreas.localContext: Bakersfield is a major city in California's San Joaquin Valley, known for its agricultural industry and country music heritage.

serviceAreas.content:
Superior Tile & Countertops extends its expert flooring and countertop services to Oildale, CA, a community with a rich history and strong ties to the oil industry. We understand the specific needs of Oildale residents and businesses, offering tailored solutions for every project, big or small. From durable and stylish flooring options that can withstand heavy use to elegant countertops that enhance any space, we're committed to providing exceptional quality and value.

Our team of skilled installers is familiar with the unique challenges of working in older homes and commercial buildings, ensuring that every installation is done right the first time. We take pride in our attention to detail and our commitment to customer satisfaction. We also offer a wide variety of tile and countertop materials to choose from.

Let Superior Tile & Countertops help you transform your Oildale property with beautiful and long-lasting flooring and countertops. Contact us today for a free estimate!

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Superior Tile & Countertops did an amazing job installing new tile in my kitchen. The installers were professional, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. The finished product looks fantastic, and I couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I hired Superior Tile to install hardwood flooring in my living room. The quality of the work was excellent, and the floors look beautiful. There was a slight delay due to a material shortage, but they communicated effectively and kept me informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We had Superior Tile install laminate flooring in our basement, and we are very pleased with the results. The price was competitive, and the installation was quick and efficient. The floors look great and are easy to clean.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Superior Tile & Countertops installed new granite countertops in my kitchen, and they did a fantastic job. The installers were very professional and took great care to protect my cabinets and appliances. The countertops look amazing, and I'm thrilled with the results.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: I had some water damage in my bathroom, and Superior Tile & Countertops repaired the damaged tiles quickly and efficiently. The repair work was seamless, and you can't even tell that there was any damage. I was very impressed with their service.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: We chose Superior Tile for our vinyl flooring project because of their reputation in Bakersfield. From helping us select waterproof vinyl to the final installation, we were very impressed. Our new laundry room floor looks great!
